name: Rogz Dog Utility Step In Harness X-Large - Pink (SSJ05-K)
shortDescription: Rogz Utility Step In Dog Harness – Pink
description: Rogz Utility Step-In Reflective Dog Harness has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for nighttime visibility RogLoc: The Fort Knox of release buckles Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-Cast Ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: XLarge 25mm. (Girth measurement of 60-100cm) - PINK
